title: Limbdi Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Limbdi with a Z-Score of +5.97. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, scoring 10.0/10 in severity.
body:
The current heat wave in Limbdi has reached critical levels, with a Z-Score of +5.97, indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures.
The city is experiencing very high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 19.9 GG, and low humidity at 25%.
The wind speed is moderate at 9.5 km/h, but it does not provide much relief from the heat, with no Heating Degree Day (HDD) value recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
